elements.grid_ref: outside ซักล้าง, near 2, F-E area, with 'ขึ้น' (up) arrow from '±0.00' reference level toward ซักล้าง
elements.description: A small set of parallel tread lines (ลูกนอนบันได ผิวปูกระเบื้องเซรามิค 8"x8", จมูกบันได อลูมิเนียมสีเงิน ร่อง PVC ขนาด 2") leading from outdoor grade (±0.00) up into ซักล้าง (+0.50) -- this is a small service-entrance stair, not the main interior stair.
F area dimension, partially matching the master grid's F-E 2.00m span

warnings: RESOLUTION OF PRIOR FLAGGED AMBIGUITY: the ground floor plan (หน้า06) printed a callout 'ST2 A-19 บันได ดูแบบขยาย' near ซักล้าง with NO clearly matching drawn stair icon at that scale (flagged there as 'stair_ST2_callout_unlocated'). THIS sheet resolves it: ST.2 is a small service-entrance stair/tread sequence leading from outdoor grade (±0.00) up into ซักล้าง (+0.50) -- a rear/utility entrance separate from ST.1 (front entrance steps, A-18) and ST.3 (main interior switchback stair, A-20). This is architecturally sensible (a laundry/utility room commonly has its own small back-door step) and fully accounts for all 3 stair callouts found on the ground floor plan.
One of 2 views on this page; sibling is the section view _view2_st2_section.json.
This sheet is A-19 (not A-20 as in house #4) since this house has only 2 sections (A-11, A-12) instead of 3, shifting every later sheet number down by 1.
